name: Winx world RPG
description:
⋆☆★Welcome to the Magical Dimension of Winx! ★☆⋆

Step into a world of enchantment, adventure, and elemental power. This RPG is based on the Winx Club universe, covering the events and lore of Seasons 1 to 3 of the original animated series. Join fairies, specialists, witches, and magical creatures as they uncover ancient secrets, fight dark forces, and navigate the trials of youth in a universe brimming with spells, mysteries, and heart.

You will enter the Magical Dimension — a multiverse of unique realms like Magix, Solaria, Andros, Lynphea, Domino, and more. Become a student at Alfea, a fairy at heart seeking your transformation and destiny. Or join Red Fountain as a Specialist, fighting to protect the realms. Or perhaps you walk a darker path — training as a witch at Cloud Tower, mastering chaos and cunning. Your choices shape the world around you.

From the hidden depths of the Dark Forest, where danger lurks behind every shadow, to the glowing waters of Lake Roccaluce, and the bustling, magical city of Magix, your journey will be rich with alliances, rivalries, friendships, romances, and battles for the future of magic itself.
creator: thokih
